Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* In LiftedTensor.v and LiftedTensor.v, we have shown that given a category C equipped with a binary operation T and an object I (called the tensor and unit resp.),
then, this structures 'transport' to a weakly equivalent univalent category D, by a weak equivalence H:C->D, making this univalent category D with a tensor and unit,
the free univalent category equipped with a tensor and a unit.
In this file, we show that if we equip (C,T) with an associator, then
1: the associator also transports to D.
2: H preserves the associator as a monoidal functor preserves the associator.
3: H makes D the free univalent category equipped with tensor, unit and the associator.
More details about the universality and the Rezk-completion can be found in LiftedMonoidal.v
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecompEquivalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.TotalCategoryFacts.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensorUnit.

Local Open Scope mor_disp.
Local Open Scope cat.

Section RezkAssociator.

  Context {C D : category} {H : functor C D}
          (Duniv : is_univalent D)
          (H_eso : essentially_surjective H)
          (H_ff : fully_faithful H).

  Context (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C)
          (α : associator TC).

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent ((D ⊠ D) ⊠ D)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent ((D ⊠ D) ⊠ D)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent (D ⊠ D)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent D

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent (D ⊠ D)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent D
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent D

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
is_univalent D

    exact Duniv.
  Qed.

  Let TD := TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC.

  Local Notation HH := (pair_functor H H).
  Let HH_eso := pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso.
  Let HH_ff := pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff.

  Local Notation HHH := (pair_functor HH H).
  Let HHH_eso := pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso.
  Let HHH_ff := pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff.

  Local Notation HHH' := (pair_functor H HH).
  Let HHH'_eso := pair_functor_eso _ _ H_eso HH_eso.
  Let HHH'_ff := pair_functor_ff _ _ H_ff HH_ff.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) (assoc_left TC ∙ H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) (assoc_left TC ∙ H)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
(C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ D
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ?G

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ (TC ∙ H))

      apply ((TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff _)).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  ((HHH ∙ pair_functor TD (functor_identity D)) ∙ TD)

   ∙ (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

nat_z_iso
  ((HHH ∙ pair_functor TD (functor_identity D)) ∙ TD)
  ((pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ HH)
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ pair_functor TD (functor_identity D))
  (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ HH)

Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x, y)
  #, id H z)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x, y), z)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x, y)
  #, id H z)
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (TC (x, y), z)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
           [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category
              (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
              Duniv)
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H) (H x, H y), H z)
· (# (pr1
        (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H)))
     (make_dirprod
        (id rad_ob
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category
                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                 (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H) (H x, H y)
         · rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (x, y) · id H (TC (x, y)))
        (id H z · id H z · id H z))
   · id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (H (TC (x, y)), H z)
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (TC (x, y), z))
· id H (TC (TC (x, y), z)) =
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (x, y) #, id H z)
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (is_univalent_functor_category
          (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
       (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
    (TC (x, y), z)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split

              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H)))
  (make_dirprod
     (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split

              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)

        (TC ∙ H) (x, y) · id H (TC (x, y))) (id H z))
· id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (make_dirprod
     (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split

  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (x, y) #, id H z)
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (is_univalent_functor_category
          (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
       (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
    (TC (x, y), z)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')

  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')

  ?t

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_trans_data
  (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
 intro ; use catbinprodmor ; apply identity.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
is_nat_trans
  (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
  ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
    (id H
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
    #, id HH
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH'))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
· (id H
        (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
  #, id HH
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))) =
(id H (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
#, id HH
        (pr2 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
· # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') f

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
   · (id H
           (pr1
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
     #, id HH
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x')))) =
pr1
  ((id H
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id HH
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') f)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
transportf
  (λ _ : D
         ⟦ pr1
             ((HHH
               ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
                x),
         pr1
           ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ∙ HHH') x') ⟧,
   D ⊠ D
   ⟦ pr2
       ((HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) x),
   pr2
     ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') x')
   ⟧) ?p
  (pr2
     (# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
      · (id H
              (pr1
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x'))
        #, id HH
                (pr2
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x'))))) =
pr2
  ((id H
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id HH
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') f)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
   · (id H
           (pr1
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
     #, id HH
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x')))) =
pr1
  ((id H
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id HH
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') f)
 exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _).
        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
transportf
  (λ _ : D
         ⟦ pr1
             ((HHH
               ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
                x),
         pr1
           ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ∙ HHH') x') ⟧,
   D ⊠ D
   ⟦ pr2
       ((HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) x),
   pr2
     ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') x')
   ⟧)
  (id_right
     (pr1
        (# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
           f)) @
   ! id_left
       (pr1
          (# (HHH
              ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             f)))
  (pr2
     (# (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
      · (id H
              (pr1
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x'))
        #, id HH
                (pr2
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x'))))) =
pr2
  ((id H
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id HH
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') f)
 abstract (rewrite transportf_const ; exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
     ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id H
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id HH
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH'))
     ((λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (HHH
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (HHH
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                         D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof x x' f))
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
        ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
          (id H
                (pr1
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x))
          #, id HH
                  (pr2
                     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C
                        C C x))))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
            ∙ HHH'))))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
     (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
      (id H
            (pr1
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
      #, id HH
              (pr2
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x))))
     (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
      (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
      total2_paths_f
        (id_right
           (pr1
              (# (HHH
                  ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D
                      D) f)) @
         ! id_left
             (pr1
                (# (HHH
                    ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                        D D) f)))
        (unassoc_commutes_subproof x x' f)) c)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') c,
(HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
(λ g : D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
       ⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
           c,
       (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c
       ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (make_nat_trans
      (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
      (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
      (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id H
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id HH
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (HHH
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (HHH
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                       D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof x x' f)) c) g)
  ?pr1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH') c,
(HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧
 use catbinprodmor ; apply identity.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
(λ g : D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
       ⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
           c,
       (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c
       ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (make_nat_trans
      (HHH ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
      (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
      (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id H
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id HH
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (HHH
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (HHH
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                         D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof x x' f)) c) g)
  (id pr11 (HHH c) #, id (pr21 (HHH c),, pr2 (HHH c)))
 abstract (split ; (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply id_right | rewrite transportf_const ; apply id_right ])).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) (assoc_right TC ∙ H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) (assoc_right TC ∙ H)

    (* This commuting diagram can be split in 3 commuting diagrams stacked together *)
    (* Step 1: The top commuting diagram is unassoc_commutes *)
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
(C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ D
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ?G

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH

  ?F2

      2: exact unassoc_commutes.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C ∙ HHH')
   ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ (HHH'
      ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD)))
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ TC) ∙ H))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  (HHH' ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ TC) ∙ H)


    (* Step 2: The lowest commuting diagram is the tensor preserving commuting one *)
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  (HHH' ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  ?G

  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ TC) ∙ H)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

nat_z_iso
  (HHH' ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ (TC ∙ H))

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso ?G
  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ (TC ∙ H))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso ?G1 (TC ∙ H)

      apply TransportedTensorComm.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  (HHH' ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC
   ∙ (HH ∙ TransportedTensor ?Duniv ?H_eso ?H_ff TC))

  (HHH' ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  ?G

  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC
   ∙ (HH ∙ TransportedTensor ?Duniv ?H_eso ?H_ff TC))

Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  ((HHH' ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD) ∙ TD)
  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ HH)
   ∙ TransportedTensor ?Duniv ?H_eso ?H_ff TC)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso
  (HHH' ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD)
  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ HH)


    (* Step 3: The middle commuting square is the tensor preserving commuting one
               but tensored with the identity functor on the left *)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (H ∙ functor_identity D)
  (functor_identity C ∙ H)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HH ∙ TD) (TC ∙ H)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (H ∙ functor_identity D)
  (functor_identity C ∙ H)
 apply (make_nat_z_iso _ _ _ (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id H)). 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
nat_z_iso (HH ∙ TD) (TC ∙ H)

    apply TransportedTensorComm.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (H x,
     rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (H y,, H z))
· (# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
           [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category
              (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
              Duniv)
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
           (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
              (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
              (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
              (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
        (TC ∙ H))
     (id H x
     #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H))
          (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))
   · (id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H)
           (H x,
           rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H) (H y, H z))
      · (id rad_ob
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                 [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                 [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category
                    (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                    D Duniv)
                 (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                    (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                 (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

                    (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                    (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                    (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
              (TC ∙ H)
              (H x,
              rad_ob
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category
                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H) (H y, H z))
         · # (pr1
                (rad_ob
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)))
             (id H x
             #, pr1
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]

                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)

                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
                  (y,, z))
         · id rad_ob
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH

                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH

                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H) (H x, H (TC (y,, z)))
         · pr1
             (rad_eps
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]

                      (precategory_binproduct_data D D)
                      D Duniv)
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                   (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                      (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                   (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                      (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH

                         H_eso)
                      (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                (TC ∙ H)) (x, TC (y,, z))
         · id H (TC (x, TC (y,, z)))
         · id H (TC (x, TC (y,, z)))))) =
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (# H (id x)
  #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (y, z))
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (is_univalent_functor_category
          (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
       (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
          (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
          (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
          (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (id H x
  #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))
· (# (pr1
        (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H)))
     (id H x
     #, pr1
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)) (y,, z))
   · id rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (H x, H (TC (y,, z)))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (x, TC (y,, z))
   · id H (TC (x, TC (y,, z)))
   · id H (TC (x, TC (y,, z)))) =
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (# H (id x)
  #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (y, z))
· rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
    [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
    (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
    (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
       [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (id H x
  #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)

     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
