C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C

           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))

           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))

  #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))

H_eso: essentially_surjective H

           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split

        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)

        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (id H x
  #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D

                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
?b =
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) 
     (TC ∙ H))
  (id H x
  #, rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor 
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H) (y, z))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (id H x
  #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))
· # (pr1
       (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)))
    (id H x
    #, pr1
         (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
            [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
            (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
               HH)
            (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
               [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
               [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
               (is_univalent_functor_category
                  (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                  Duniv)
               (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                  (D ⊠ D) D HH)
               (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
               (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                  (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                  (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                  (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
            (TC ∙ H)) (y,, z)) = ?b

      apply (! functor_comp TD _ _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
# TD
  ((id H x
   #, # (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H)) (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)))
   · (id H x
     #, pr1
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)) (y,, z))) =
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

   · pr1

           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (y, z))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (y,, z) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (y, z)

# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

        (is_univalent_functor_category

        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)

        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH

        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) 
  (TC ∙ H) (y, z)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H

α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
# (rad_ob [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH

        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (make_dirprod (id H y) (id H z)) = ?y'

      apply (functor_id TD).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
id TD (H y, H z)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (y,, z) =
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (y, z)

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x, TC (y, z))
· # TD
    (# H (id x)
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (y, z))

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
nat_z_iso_inv
  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (x, TC (y, z))
· # TD
    (# H (id x)
    #, nat_z_iso_inv
         (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z)),,
   pr2
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z)))
· nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z)),,
   pr2
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z))) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (y, z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)
       ((x, y), z),,
     pr2 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)
       ((x, y), z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
t:= TransportedAssocRightOnOb x y z: TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z)),,
   pr2
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z))) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (y, z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)
       ((x, y), z),,
     pr2 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)
       ((x, y), z))

t:= TransportedAssocRightOnOb x y z: TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))
?t1 =
(# H (id x)
#, nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (y, z))
· (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (y, z))

      apply binprod_comp.

       (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))
?y = # TD (id (H x, (TC ∙ H) (y, z)))

      apply (! functor_id TD _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
x, y, z: C
t:= TransportedAssocRightOnOb x y z: TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z) =
# TD
  (# H (id x)
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (y, z))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z)),,
   pr2
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, TC (y, z))) =
id TD (HH (x, TC (y, z)))
· TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
    (x, TC (y, z))

    apply (! id_left _).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
associator TD

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
associator TD

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

    exact (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H).
  Defined.

  Let αD := TransportedAssociator.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
pre_whisker HHH TransportedAssociator =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
  (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
pre_whisker HHH TransportedAssociator =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
  (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))): pre_whisker HHH
  (lift_nat_trans_along 
     (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
           (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)))) =
nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
pre_whisker HHH TransportedAssociator =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
  (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
has_homsets (D,, Duniv)

      apply homset_property.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))): pre_whisker HHH
  (lift_nat_trans_along 
     (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
           (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)))) =
nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)) =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
  (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)
 exact (nat_trans_comp_assoc (homset_property _)
                                     _ _ _ _
              (pr1 TransportedAssocLeft)
              (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H)
              (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
αD (HHH x) =
TransportedAssocLeft x · # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight x

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
αD (HHH x) =
TransportedAssocLeft x · # H (α x)
· nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight x

    exact (λ x, toforallpaths _ _ _ (base_paths _ _ TransportedAssociatorEq) x).
  Qed.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

D ⟦ assoc_left TD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4),
H (assoc_left TC ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)) ⟧

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
D
⟦ functor_identity D
    (pr2 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))),
functor_identity D (pr2 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
⟧
 exact ((TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (x3,x4)).
  Defined.

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
D
⟦ functor_identity D
    (pr1
       (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
          (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))),
functor_identity D
  (pr1
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
        ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)))) ⟧
 apply identity.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
D
⟦ TD
    (pr2
       (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
          (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))),
TD
  (pr2
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
        ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)))) ⟧

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
∏ x1 x2 x3 x4 : C,
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
assoc_left_tensor_l x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l x1 x2 x3 x4

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
# TD
  (# TD
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_l x1 x2 x3 x4

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
# TD
  (# TD
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· (pr1
     (pr2 TransportedAssocRight
        ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
   · # TD
       (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x1, x2)
       #, id TD
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D
                     D ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)))))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) = ?b

  (# TD

       #, id TD
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
(pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)
· # H (α ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· pr1
    (pr2 TransportedAssocRight ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

      exact (TransportedAssociatorOnOb ((TC (x1,x2),x3),x4)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
# TD
  (# TD
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· αD (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, id TD
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                  ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))

  (# TD

  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· αD (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))

                                                     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))) #, id functor_identity D (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
(pr11 αD)
  (((HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      (x1, x2), H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))),
  functor_identity D
    (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· # (assoc_right TD)
    ((TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
        (x1, x2)
     #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
    #, id functor_identity D
            (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· # TD
    (nat_z_iso_inv
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x1, x2)
    #, id TD
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                  ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD)
  (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     ((TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x1, x2)
      #, id H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))
     #, id functor_identity D
             (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4)))))
· (nat_z_iso_inv
     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x1, x2)
  #, id TD
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))

αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (id (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
        (x1, x2)
  #, id TD
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (id ((HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (x1, x2),
      TD
        (pr2
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
              ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4)))))

      apply (! functor_id TD _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((TD (H x1, H x2), H x3), H x4) =
(pr11 αD)
  (((HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      (x1, x2), H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))),
  functor_identity D
    (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))
· id TD
       (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
             (((HH
                ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC) (x1, x2),
              H (pr21 ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))),
             functor_identity D
               (pr2 (HHH ((TC (x1, x2), x3), x4))))))

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.


  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
∏ x1 x2 x3 x4 : C,
αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4) =
assoc_left_tensor_m x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_m x1 x2 x3 x4

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4) =
# TD
  (# TD
     (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x2, x3))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· assoc_right_tensor_m x1 x2 x3 x4

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4) =
# TD
  (# TD
     (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x2, x3))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
· # H (α ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight
     ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · # (assoc_right TD)
       ((id H x1
        #, nat_z_iso_inv
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# TD
  (# TD
     (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x2, x3))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))

· (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight
     ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)
   · # (assoc_right TD)
       ((id H x1
        #, nat_z_iso_inv
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (x2, x3)) #, id 
       H x4))

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# TD
  (# TD
     (id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (x2, x3))
  #, id functor_identity D
          (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· αD (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
· # (assoc_right TD)
    ((id H x1
     #, nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x2, x3)) #, id 
    H x4)

  ((H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)),

    #, id functor_identity D

    ((id H x1
     #, nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)

  (# (functor_identity D)
     (pr1
        (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
           ((id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
            #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC (x2, x3))
           #, id functor_identity D
                   (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))))
   · # (functor_identity D)
       (pr1
          (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)

                      H_ff TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)))
  #, # TD
       (pr2
          (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             ((id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
              #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC (x2, x3))
             #, id functor_identity D
                     (pr2
                        (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))))
     · # TD
         (pr2

                    H_ff TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)))
  #, # TD

                   H_ff TC (x2, x3))
             #, id functor_identity D
                     (pr2
                        (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))))
     · # TD
         (pr2

               ((id H x1
                #, nat_z_iso_inv
                     (TransportedTensorComm Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC) (x2, x3))
               #, id H x4))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

α: associator TC

HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (pr2
     (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        ((id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
         #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
              (x2, x3))
        #, id functor_identity D
                (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))))
· # TD
    (pr2
       (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
          ((id H x1
           #, nat_z_iso_inv
                (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                   H_ff TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
(pr21 ((id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
       #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (x2, x3))
      #, id functor_identity D
              (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))

         #, nat_z_iso_inv
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff

#, pr2

           (x2, x3))

?y =

      #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (x2, x3))
     #, id functor_identity D
             (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· pr21 ((id H x1
        #, nat_z_iso_inv
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)

      exact (! pr12 (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (x2,x3))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4) =
(pr11 αD)
  ((H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)),
   (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x2, x3)),
  functor_identity D
    (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· # TD
    (# (functor_identity D)
       (pr1
          (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             ((id H x1
              #, nat_z_iso_inv
                   (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                      H_ff TC) (x2, x3)) #, id H x4)))
    #, # TD
         (id (HH
              ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
               (x2, x3)
         #, pr2
              ((id H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))
               #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC (x2, x3))
              #, id functor_identity D
                      (pr2
                         (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
            · pr2
                ((id H x1
                 #, nat_z_iso_inv
                      (TransportedTensorComm Duniv
                         H_eso H_ff TC) (x2, x3))
                #, id H x4)))

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 = # TD (id H x1 #, id TD (TD (H x2, H x3),, H x4))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 = # TD (id (H x1, TD (TD (H x2, H x3),, H x4)))

      apply (! functor_id TD _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, TD (H x2, H x3)), H x4) =
(pr11 αD)
  ((H (pr11 ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4)),
   (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (x2, x3)),
  functor_identity D
    (pr2 (HHH ((x1, TC (x2, x3)), x4))))
· id TD
       (H x1,
       TD
         (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (H x2, H x3),, H x4))

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
∏ x1 x2 x3 x4 : C,
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
assoc_left_tensor_r x1 x2 x3 x4
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· assoc_right_tensor_r x1 x2 x3 x4

∏ x1 x2 x3 x4 : C,

· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· assoc_right_tensor_r x1 x2 x3 x4

H: C ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

x1, x2, x3, x4: C

· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· assoc_right_tensor_r x1 x2 x3 x4

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # TD
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # TD
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # TD
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                   ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
       #, # TD
            (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) 
                    (x3, x4)))))

Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4))
· (pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· ((pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
     ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
   · # TD
       (id functor_identity D
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D

          (pr1

    #, # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
(pr11 TransportedAssocLeft) ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))
· # H (α ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· (pr11 (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
    ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))

      exact (TransportedAssociatorOnOb (((x1,x2), TC (x3,x4)))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) · αD (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· # TD
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?b =
# TD
  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) · αD (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· # TD
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) 
                 (x3, x4))))

Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) · αD (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
· # TD
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?y =

  (id TD (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) · αD (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?y =
# TD
  (# TD (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4)) · αD (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))

      exact (! pr21 αD _ _  (id  (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))) #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (x3, x4))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
(pr11 αD)
  (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))),
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (x3, x4))
· # (assoc_right TD)
    (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
    #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (# (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD)
     (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
        #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (x3, x4)))
   · (id functor_identity D
           (pr1
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
     #, # TD
          (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
          #, pr1
               (pr2
                  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                     H_ff TC) (x3, x4)))))

          (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (# (functor_identity D)
     (pr1
        (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
           (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
           #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC (x3, x4))))
   · id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
  #, # TD
       (pr2
          (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
             #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                  TC (x3, x4))))
     · # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (id functor_identity D
        (pr1
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
              ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
  #, # TD
       (pr2
          (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
             #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                  TC (x3, x4))))
     · # TD
         (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (x3, x4))))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
# TD
  (pr2
     (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
        #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (x3, x4))))
· # TD
    (id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
    #, pr1
         (pr2
            (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
            (x3, x4)))

      #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
           (x3, x4))
 · id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
#, pr2
     (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
     #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

x1, x2, x3, x4: C
?t1 =
pr2
  (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
  #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (x3, x4))
· pr1
    (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
       (x3, x4))

      exact (! pr12 (pr2 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) (x3,x4))).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
(pr11 αD)
  (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))),
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (x3, x4))
· # TD
    (id functor_identity D
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
                ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))))
    #, # TD
         (pr21 (id pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4)))
               #, TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC (x3, x4))
          · id pr21 ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4))
         #, id (HH
                ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                    TC) (x3, x4)))

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
x1, x2, x3, x4: C
αD ((H x1, H x2), TD (H x3, H x4)) =
(pr11 αD)
  (pr1 (HHH ((x1, x2), TC (x3, x4))),
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
    (x3, x4))
· id TD
       (H x1,
       TD
         (H x2,,
          TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
            (H x3, H x4)))

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  Context (I : C).

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
functor_ass_disp_cat α αD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id pr1 H I)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
# TD
  ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, y) #, id pr1 H z)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (TC (x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

I, x, y, z: C
# TD
  ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, y) #, id pr1 H z)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (TC (x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =

· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))

I, x, y, z: C
# TD
  ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, y) #, id pr1 H z)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (TC (x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

     (x, y) #, id pr1 H z)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (TC (x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I, x, y, z: C
?b =

  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))

· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

I, x, y, z: C
# TD
  ((pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
     (x, y) #, id pr1 H z)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (TC (x, y), z) = ?y'

      exact (! TransportedAssocLeftOnOb x y z).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
# TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z)) = TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
