HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

  (id pr1 H x

· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z)) = TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

# TD
  (# H (id x)

       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z)) = TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)

      exact (! TransportedAssocRightOnOb x y z).

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))

· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)

              H_ff TC))

           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
# TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z)) =
(pr1 TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z),,
 pr2 TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z))
· id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso

       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff

# TD
  (id pr1 H x

       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z)) =
pr1 TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z),,
pr2 TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)

      exact p1'.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

I, x, y, z: C

  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =

· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC))

   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft cc1)
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1)
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)

dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
transportf
  (λ x : HHH ∙ assoc_left TD ⟹ HHH ∙ assoc_right TD,
   is_nat_z_iso x) ?p (pr2 dd) =
pr2 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)

  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)

        apply (! lift_nat_trans_along_comm (_,,Duniv) _ HHH_eso HHH_ff _).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
pre_whisker HHH
  (lift_nat_trans_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
     (pr1 dd)) = pr1 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)


      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
lift_nat_trans_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (pr1 dd) = cc

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
pr1 dd =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
  (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
has_homsets (D,, Duniv)

      apply homset_property.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)

· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
p2: cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
q:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) x,
   (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) x ⟧) 
  (pr11 dd) (pr11 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc))
  (base_paths (pr1 dd)
     (pr1 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc))
     (base_paths dd (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)
        p2')) ((x, y), z): (pr11 dd) ((x, y), z) =
(pr11 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)) ((x, y), z)
cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
q:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
   D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) x,
   (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) x ⟧) 
  (pr11 dd) (pr11 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc))
  (base_paths (pr1 dd)
     (pr1 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc))
     (base_paths dd (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)
        p2')) ((x, y), z): (pr11 dd) ((x, y), z) =
(pr11 (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc)) ((x, y), z)
cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = (pr11 dd) ((x, y), z)

      apply assoc'.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
p2: cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)

· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
p2: cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) = ?b

  HHH_ff

        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))

  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),

       (y, z))

   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =

cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)

  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)

  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp

  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),

(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),

?b =

  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
p2: cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
?y =
lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp (nat_z_iso_comp cc0 cc1) cc2)
  ((pr1 H x, pr1 H y), pr1 H z)

      exact p2.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =

id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)

  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
p2: cc0' · cc1' · cc2' = cc'
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
cc0' · cc1' · cc2'
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
cc0' · cc1' · cc2'
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc1':= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0':= TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD) ((x, y), z),
(assoc_left TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc2':= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z): D ⟦ (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z),
(HHH ∙ assoc_right TD) ((x, y), z) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x
    #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC)) (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (x, TC (y, z))

  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =

· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x

                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =

  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =

· post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· # TD
    (id pr1 H x

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =

· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)

  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)

  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
cc0 ((x, y), z) · # (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
TransportedAssocLeft ((x, y), z)
· (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
   · (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
      · (# TD
           (id pr1 H x
           #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC)) (y, z))
         · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)) (x, TC (y, z)))))

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =

p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
# (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
   · (# TD
        (id pr1 H x
        #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)) (y, z))
      · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (x, TC (y, z))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
# (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
