HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
?b =
post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
   · (# TD
        (id pr1 H x
        #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)) 
             (y, z))
      · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (x, TC (y, z))))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
?b =
post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
   · (# TD
        (id pr1 H x
        #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC)) (y, z))
      · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (x, TC (y, z))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
?t1 =
nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)) (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
       (x, TC (y, z)))

      exact (! p1).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I, x, y, z: C
p1': # TD
  (id pr1 H x
  #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (y, z))
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC)) (x, TC (y, z)) =
TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
p1: nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight ((x, y), z)
· (# TD
     (id pr1 H x
     #, (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC)) 
          (y, z))
   · (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC)) 
       (x, TC (y, z))) =
id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)
cc:= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight)): nat_z_iso (assoc_left TD) (assoc_right TD)
cc1:= post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H: nat_z_iso (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
cc0:= TransportedAssocLeft: nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ H)
cc2:= nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight: nat_z_iso (assoc_right TC ∙ H)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
dd:= nat_z_iso_comp cc0 (nat_z_iso_comp cc1 cc2): nat_z_iso (HHH ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (HHH ∙ assoc_right TD)
p2': dd = pre_whisker_nat_z_iso HHH cc
cc':= lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) HHH HHH_eso
  HHH_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp TransportedAssocLeft
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv TransportedAssocRight))
  (HHH ((x, y), z)): (D,, Duniv) ⟦ assoc_left TD (HHH ((x, y), z)),
assoc_right TD (HHH ((x, y), z)) ⟧
# (pr1 H) (α ((x, y), z)) =
post_whisker_nat_z_iso α H ((x, y), z)
· id (assoc_right TC ∙ H) ((x, y), z)

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  Context {E : category} (Euniv : is_univalent E)
          (TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E)
          (αE : associator TE).

  Context (IE : E).

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
disp_functor
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
  (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE)

  
C, D: category

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
disp_functor
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
  (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E

αE: associator TE
IE: E
disp_functor_data
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
  (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) 
          (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
          (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) 
  ?pr1

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

disp_functor_data
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
  (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x
→ functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
(λ Fob : ∏
         x : functor_tensorunit_cat
               (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
               TE (H I) IE,
         functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x
         → functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
             (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
                H_ff TC I TE IE x),
 ∏
 (x
  y : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE) (xx : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x)
 (yy : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y)
 (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE) f] Fob y yy) 
  ?pr1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x
→ functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)

      exact (λ G GG, functor_ass_composition H_pα GG).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) (functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE)
          (functor_ass_disp_cat α αE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  ((λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
             (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             TE (H I) IE)
    (GG : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE G),
    functor_ass_composition H_pα GG),,
   ((λ (x
        y : functor_tensorunit_cat
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              TE (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x)
     (yy : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : xx -->[ f] yy), tt)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏
             x : functor_tensorunit_cat
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) TE (H I) IE,
             functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x
             → functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
                 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE x),
     ∏
     (x
      y : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x)
     (yy : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy
     → Fob x xx -->[
       # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
            TC I TE IE) f] Fob y yy)
      (λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                TE (H I) IE)
       (GG : functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE G),
       functor_ass_composition H_pα GG)))
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
disp_functor_ff precompA

yy: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompA x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompA y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompA ff) y0)
transportf
  (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
   (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) x0 = y0) 
  ?p (pr2 x0) = pr2 x'

IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE

yy: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧

# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompA y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompA ff) y0)
pr1 x0 = pr1 x'
 apply isapropunit.

# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompA y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) y0

  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) (pr1 x') = y0)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE x
yy: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompA x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompA y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompA ff) y0)
(λ cntr : x0 = x', ∏ t : x0 = x', t = cntr)
  (total2_paths_f
     (let X := λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x')
        in
      X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x'))
     (proofirrelevance
        ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff)
           (pr1 x') = y0)
        (hlevelntosn 0
           ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff)
              (pr1 x') = y0)
           (isapropunit (♯ precompA (pr1 x')) y0))
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
            (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff) x0 =
            y0)
           (let X :=
              λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x') in
            X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x')) (pr2 x0)) (pr2 x')))
 intro ; apply p.

issurjective (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompA ff)

d1, d2, d3: D
# TE ((pr112 G) (d1, d2) #, id (pr11 G) d3)
· (pr112 G) (TD (d1, d2), d3)
· # (pr11 G) (αD ((d1, d2), d3)) =
αE (((pr11 G) d1, (pr11 G) d2), (pr11 G) d3)
· # TE (id (pr11 G) d1 #, (pr112 G) (d2, d3))
· (pr112 G) (d1, TD (d2, d3))

d1, d2, d3: D
isaprop
  (# TE ((pr112 G) (d1, d2) #, id (pr11 G) d3)
   · (pr112 G) (TD (d1, d2), d3)
   · # (pr11 G) (αD ((d1, d2), d3)) =
   αE (((pr11 G) d1, (pr11 G) d2), (pr11 G) d3)
   · # TE (id (pr11 G) d1 #, (pr112 G) (d2, d3))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

   · (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, d3)))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (TC (c1, c2), c3) · # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (c2, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
tt:= cancel_postcomposition
  (# TE
     ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
        (c1, c2)
     #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (TC (c1, c2), c3)
   · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
  (αE
     (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
      (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
     (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · # TE
       (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m: # TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD
       (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (TC (c1, c2), c3) · # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (c2, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))


      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
tt:= cancel_postcomposition
  (# TE
     ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
        (c1, c2)
     #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (TC (c1, c2), c3)
   · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
  (αE
     (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
      (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
     (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · # TE
       (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m: # TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3) · # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
tt:= cancel_postcomposition
  (# TE
     ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
        (c1, c2)
     #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (TC (c1, c2), c3)
   · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
  (αE
     (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
      (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
     (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · # TE
       (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m: # TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))

  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
tt:= cancel_postcomposition
  (# TE
     ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
        (c1, c2)
     #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (TC (c1, c2), c3)
   · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
  (αE
     (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
      (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
     (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
              H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · # TE
       (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m: # TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) · m
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3) · 
     # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
tt:= cancel_postcomposition
  (# TE
     ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
        (c1, c2)
     #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (TC (c1, c2), c3)
   · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
  (αE
     (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
      (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

              H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
   · # TE

                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))

        apply idpath.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=

    let X0 :=

                 H_ff TC) in

       #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

            (c2, c3))
   · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
               H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
       (c1, TC (c2, c3))) m t
:
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3)) · m =

  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =

# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3) · # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))


      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr11 G)
    (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)
     · ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3) · # H (α ((c1, c2), c3))
     · (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3))
        · # TD
            (# H (id c1)
            #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3)))) =
# TE (pt_GH (c1, c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· # (pr11 G)
    (pr1
       (pr2
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
     · # TD
         (id H c1
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (c2,, c3))))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· (# (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
   · (# (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
      · # (pr1 G)
          (# TD
             (# H (id c1)
             #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))))) =
# TE
  (ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
  #, id (pr11 G) (H c3)) · pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· (# (pr1 G)
     (pr1
        (pr2
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD
          (id H c1
          #, pr1
               (pr2
                  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                     H_ff TC) (c2,, c3)))))

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

αE: associator TE
IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

H: C ⟶ D

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC

  ((let X :=

    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=

                 H_ff TC) in

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =

· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))

# TE

pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· (# (pr1 G)
     (pr1
        (pr2
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD
          (id H c1
          #, pr1
               (pr2
                  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                     H_ff TC) 
                  (c2,, c3)))))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

     (pr1 G))

        apply idpath.

          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· (# (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
   · (# (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
      · # (pr1 G)
          (# TD
             (# H (id c1)
             #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))))) =
# TE
  (ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
  #, id (pr11 G) (H c3)) · pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· (# (pr1 G)
     (pr1
        (pr2
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD
          (id H c1
          #, pr1
               (pr2
                  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                     H_ff TC) (c2,, c3)))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· (# (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
   · (# (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
      · # (pr1 G)
          (# TD
             (# H (id c1)
             #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))))) =
# TE
  (ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
  #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
   · # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3)))
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· (# (pr1 G)
     (pr1
        (pr2
           (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
           (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD
          (id H c1
          #, pr1
               (pr2
                  (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                     H_ff TC) (c2,, c3)))))

  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· (# (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
   · (# (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
      · # (pr1 G)
          (# TD
             (# H (id c1)
             #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))))) =
# TE
  ((ptG (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
   · (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2)) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3)))
· (ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
   · # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3)))
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· (# (pr1 G) (pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
# TE ((pr112 G) (H c1, H c2) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· (# (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
   · # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))

   · (# (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))

             #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))))) =

· # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
· # (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr1 G)
    (# TD (# H (id c1) #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))) =
# TE (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2)) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
· # (pr1 G)
    (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
(pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3))
· # (pr1 G) (ptF (TC (c1, c2), c3))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (α ((c1, c2), c3)))
· # (pr1 G) (nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr1 G)
    (# TD (id H c1 #, nat_z_iso_inv ptF (c2, c3))) =
# TE (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2)) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
· # (H ∙ pr1 G) (α ((c1, c2), c3))
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3))))
· # (pr1 G)
    (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))

H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1

  ((let X :=

        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in

    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in

            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)

qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
(pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)) =
# TE (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2)) #, id (pr11 G) (H c3))
· ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
