H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq: pt_GH (TC (c1, c2), c3) =
ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (TC (c1, c2), c3))
(pr112 G) (TD (H c1, H c2), H c3)
· # (pr1 G) (# TD (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)) =
# TE
  (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2)) #, # (pr1 G) (id H c3))
· ptG (H (TC (c1, c2)), H c3)

      exact (! pr212 G _ _ (ptF (c1, c2) #, id H c3)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3))
· # (pr11 G)
    (pr1
       (pr2
          (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
          (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
     · # TD
         (id H c1
         #, pr1
              (pr2
                 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                    H_ff TC) (c2,, c3)))) =
αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· # TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  ((let X :=

                 H_ff TC) in

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)

αE
  (((pr11 G) (H c1), (pr11 G) (H c2)),
  (pr11 G) (H c3))
· (# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

αE: associator TE
IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

     (pr1 G))

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

αE: associator TE
IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  ((let X :=

# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

     (pr1 G))

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC

  ((let X :=

· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))

        apply idpath.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

E: category

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=

          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· (pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3))
   · # (pr11 G)
       (pr1
          (pr2
             (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                TC) (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
        · # TD
            (id H c1
            #, pr1
                 (pr2
                    (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC) (c2,, c3))))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, pt_GH (c2, c3))
· (ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
   · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
   · # (pr11 G)
       (pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
        · # TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
 apply idpath.

     I TE IE G)

  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC

    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD

                 H_ff TC) in

            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

     I TE IE G)

· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

            pr2

                 H_ff TC) in

            (c : C ⊠ C),

          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)

   · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))

        · # TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, (pr112 G) (H c2, H c3))
· (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
   · (# (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
      · # (pr11 G)
          (pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
           · # TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))))) =
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
?b = (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)

                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1

  ((let X :=

    let X0 :=

   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in

            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

?b

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

     (pr1

m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)

qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =

· # (pr1 G)

?t2

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,

        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)

    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,

              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in

            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso

  (TC ∙ H)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)

t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# (pr1 G)
  (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3))
   · pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))) = ?b

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =

· pr1 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,, c3))) = ?t2

          apply (pr12 (pr2 ptF (c1, TC (c2,c3)))).

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

     (pr1 G))

                 H_ff TC) in

      · # (pr1 G)
          (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))))) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))) =
?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
?b = (pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))) =
?b

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr1 G)
    (# TD (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))) = 
?t2

        apply (! pr212 G _ _ ((id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3))))).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
     (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))
   · (pr112 G)
       (H c1,
       (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (c2,, c3))) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (# (pair_functor (pr1 G) (pr1 G) ∙ TE)
     (id H c1 #, pr1 (pr2 ptF (c2,, c3)))
   · (pr112 G)
       (H c1,
       (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
         (c2,, c3))) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (# TE
     (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
     #, # (pr1 G)
          (pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (c2,, c3)))
   · (pr112 G)
       (H c1,
       TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (H c2, H c3))) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

                 H_ff TC) in

(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· (# TE
     (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
     #, # (pr1 G)
          (pr1
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (rad_eps
                   [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                   D]
                   [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                   D]
                   (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                      (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                   (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (is_univalent_functor_category
                         (precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D) D Duniv)
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                      (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))
                      (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                         (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                         (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                      D]
                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                      (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            D D, D]
                         [precategory_binproduct_data
                            C C, D]
                         (is_univalent_functor_category
                            (precategory_binproduct_data
                               D D) D Duniv)
                         (pre_composition_functor
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                         (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))
                         (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                            (pair_functor_eso H H
                               H_eso H_eso)
                            (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                               H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
             (c2,, c3)))
   · (pr112 G)
       (H c1,
       TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         (H c2, H c3))) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
· # TE
    (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
    #, # (pr1 G)
         (pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

H: C ⟶ D

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv

  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC

           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,

      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =

# TE
  ((# (pr1 G) (id H c1) #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3)))
   · (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
     #, # (pr1 G)
          (pr1

                            H_eso)
                         (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                            H_ff))) (TC ∙ H),,
                 pr2
                   (rad_eps
                      [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                      D]
                      [precategory_binproduct_data C C,

                      (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                         (D ⊠ D) D HH)

                            (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH

· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,

H: C ⟶ D
