                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (id pr1 G (H c1) · id pr1 G (H c1)
  #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
     · # (pr1 G)
         (pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (id pr1 G (H c1)
  #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
     · # (pr1 G)
         (pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
  #, # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
     · # (pr1 G)
         (pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
  #, # (pr1 G)
       (ptH (c2, c3)
        · pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

H: C ⟶ D

· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))

  ((let X :=

    let X0 :=

    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD

            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,

                 H_ff TC) in

          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),

                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)

                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)

                        [precategory_binproduct_data D

                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH

                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
?b

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

α: associator TC

HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'

E: category

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C

αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),

         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

  ((let X :=

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom

     (pr1 G))

pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
  #, # (pr1 G)
       (ptH (c2, c3)
        · pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
?b

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
  #, # (pr1 G)
       (ptH (c2, c3)
        · pr1
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (rad_eps
                  [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                     (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (is_univalent_functor_category
                        (precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D) D Duniv)
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                           H_eso)
                        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
                  (TC ∙ H),,
                pr2
                  (rad_eps
                     [precategory_binproduct_data D D,
                     D]
                     [precategory_binproduct_data C C,
                     D]
                     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                        (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (is_univalent_functor_category
                           (precategory_binproduct_data
                              D D) D Duniv)
                        (pre_composition_functor
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))
                        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso
                              H_eso)
                           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff
                              H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))))
            (c2,, c3))) = ?y'

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
ptH (c2, c3)
· pr1
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H),,
        pr2
          (rad_eps
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
                [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
                (is_univalent_functor_category
                   (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                   Duniv)
                (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C)
                   (D ⊠ D) D HH)
                (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
                (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                   (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                   (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                   (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
             (TC ∙ H)))) (c2,, c3) = ?t2

        apply (pr12 (pr2 ptF (c2,c3))).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (# (pr1 G) (id H c1)
  #, # (pr1 G)
       (id (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (c2, c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

αE: associator TE
IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))

  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G))

αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso

         (c2, c3))

            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))

  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))

⟹ TC ∙ H

  (TC ∙ H)

       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
# TE
  (id pr1 G (H c1)
  #, id pr1 G
          ((HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             (c2, c3))) = ?y'

        apply (functor_id TE).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
α: associator TC
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
HHH_eso:= pair_functor_eso HH H HH_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HHH
HHH_ff:= pair_functor_ff HH H HH_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HHH
HHH'_eso:= pair_functor_eso H HH H_eso HH_eso: essentially_surjective HHH'
HHH'_ff:= pair_functor_ff H HH H_ff HH_ff: fully_faithful HHH'
αD:= TransportedAssociator: associator TD
I: C
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
αE: associator TE
IE: E
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ass_disp_cat α αE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
c1, c2, c3: C
t:= GG c1 c2 c3: # TE
  ((pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
     (c1, c2)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (TC (c1, c2), c3)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G))
    (α ((c1, c2), c3)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
             H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1,
   (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c2),
  (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
           H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c3)
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)) c1
    #, (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                 H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
         (c2, c3))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
            H_ff TC I TE IE G)) 
    (c1, TC (c2, c3))
ptG:= pr112 G: nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (pr1 G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom
     (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
     (pr1 G))
ptH:= pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC): HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
⟹ TC ∙ H
pt_GH:= pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
         H_ff TC I TE IE G): nat_trans_data
  (functor_tensor_map_dom TE
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC
     (pr1
        (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
           H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)))
m:= # (pr11 G)
  ((let X :=
      λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
      pr2
        (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
      in
    let X0 :=
      λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) (c : C ⊠ C), pr1 (X TC c)
      in
    X0 TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))
   · # TD
       (id H c1
       #, let X :=
            λ TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C,
            pr2
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC) in
          let X0 :=
            λ (TC : C ⊠ C ⟶ C) 
            (c : C ⊠ C), 
            pr1 (X TC c) in
          X0 TC (c2,, c3))): E ⟦ (pr11 G) (H (TC (c1, TC (c2,, c3)))),
(pr11 G) (TD (H c1, TD (H c2,, H c3))) ⟧
ptF:= TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: nat_z_iso
  (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
  (TC ∙ H)
pp: pt_GH (c1, c2) =
ptG (H c1, H c2) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, c2))
qq': pt_GH (c1, TC (c2, c3)) =
ptG (H c1, H (TC (c2, c3)))
· # (pr11 G) (ptH (c1, TC (c2, c3)))
qq'': pt_GH (c2, c3) =
ptG (H c2, H c3) · # (pr11 G) (ptH (c2, c3))
id TE
     (pr1 G (H c1),
     pr1 G
       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
          (H c2, H c3)))
· (pr112 G)
    (H c1,
    TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c2, H c3)) =
(pr112 G) (H c1, TD (H c2, H c3))

      apply id_left.
  Qed.
